main.name: Hi there!
main.description: Software engineer and aspiring life enjoyer.
main.bio: I build distributed systems and ops tooling at DoorDash -- and explore the world the rest of the time. 40+ countries visited, most recently walking the Camino de Santiago across Spain and backpacking through Garibaldi Provincial Park in British Columbia. UCLA Computer Science grad with a background spanning logistics platforms, autonomous vehicles, and biomedical imaging. When I'm not traveling or shipping code, I'm in the gym, dialing in macros, or plotting the next adventure.
main.contactmessage: Feel free to reach out -- whether it's about code, travel, or the best ramen in Seattle.

resume.skillmessage: Languages and tools I work with day-to-day and have used in production

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: GPA: 3.89/4.00 — Dean's Honors (all terms). Member of UPE and IEEE-HKN Honor Societies. IEEE-Eta Kappa Nu Membership Chair: organized orientation and induction for 50+ members. Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Machine Learning, Embedded Systems, Computer Networks, Compilers, Parallel Programming, Linear Algebra.

work.title: Software Engineer — Logistics Platform
work.description: Building Task Console, a self-serve ops platform supporting 21 active Dasher task types across 6+ teams (DashMart, JETS, Waymo, Wolt). Shipped bulk task operations enabling 10,000+ tasks per batch. Architecting zero-downtime Pedregal migration via Kafka shadow pipeline. Migrated 16 pay configs from static JSON to CRDB-backed gRPC API, cutting new task onboarding from days to hours. Stack: Kotlin, Go, TypeScript, React, Kafka, gRPC, CRDB, DGS/GraphQL.

work.title: Founding Engineer (Part-time)
work.description: Co-founding an early-stage startup backed by the Google Startups Cloud Program. Building the core technical foundation part-time alongside my full-time role at DoorDash.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
work.description: Built a React/Java platform enabling bulk upload and download of Amazon Business invoicing response rules, reducing rule configuration time by 80× and cutting business invoicing rejection rate by 40%. Implemented Excel deserialization, validation, and rollback on partial upload failure.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
work.description: Built a C++ application increasing Echo Show camera resolution using super-resolution (SR) algorithms with OpenCV. Introduced support for 4 SR algorithms, 2 upscaling factors, and custom frame acquisition. Achieved 40% average image quality improvement measured by PSNR and SSIM metrics.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
work.description: Built an execution proxy for remote execution optimization, reducing operational costs by $100K/month.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
work.description: Designed C++ data structures to collect geometric information of routable lanes surrounding autonomous vehicles. Built a 3-layer end-to-end pipeline using RPCs to transfer lane data for front-end display. Contributed to a 62% expansion of the self-driving zone across San Francisco, Phoenix, and Austin.
